name: Transformers: War for Cybertron
post_apply_message:
TWFC FPS unlock — per-session steps:
1. In Steam Input, bind a back button to Numpad 0.
2. In game, press Num0 once to unlock the FPS cap (the trainer attaches ~20s after launch).
3. Cap the game at 60 FPS in the Quick Access Menu — the game glitches above 60.
NOTE: this trainer is UNTESTED under Proton. If Num0 does nothing, the trainer may not attach under Wine — report back and we rethink.
notes: FPS cap unlocker (trainer) by Psych / psych.hopto.org, 2010 — readme permits free redistribution unaltered; see docs/TRAiNER.txt. The 30 FPS cap has NO static fix (no ini/exe/dll patch exists per PCGamingWiki research 2026-07-06), so this is runtime memory patching: the wrapper launches the trainer inside the game's Proton prefix by reusing Steam's own launch stack with the verb swapped to 'run'. Game is delisted; appid 42650. Trainer is a packed 32-bit exe — AV false positives expected. Unverified on Proton; unverified install dir name (game not on the Windows PC).
